2022-23 Creighton Bluejays Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 24-13 (14-6, 3rd in Big East MBB)

Coach: Greg McDermott

PS/G: 76.4 (64th of 363)

PA/G: 68.4 (124th of 363)

SRS: 17.82 (11th of 363)

SOS: 9.80 (10th of 363)

ORtg: 109.6 (58th of 363)

DRtg: 98.1 (79th of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +2500

NCAA Tournament: (#6 seed in South)
Won South First Round (72-63) versus #11 NC State
Won South Second Round (85-76) versus #3 Baylor
Won South Regional Semifinal (86-75) versus #15 Princeton
Lost South Regional Final (57-56) versus #5 San Diego State
